description_long: This is a circular ring made of a dark, metallic material, featuring a continuous row of small, round gemstones embedded along its outer circumference. The gemstones appear to be evenly spaced and are set flush with the surface, giving the ring a refined and uniform appearance. The metal has a glossy, polished finish, reflecting light and enhancing the contrast with the darker stones. The band is of moderate thickness, suggesting durability while maintaining elegance. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on symmetry and subtle ornamentation. This piece would be suitable for everyday wear or as a statement accessory in an urban setting.
description: A dark, polished metal ring with a row of small, evenly spaced gemstones set along its outer edge. The design is sleek, modern, and subtly ornamental.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the full circular shape and the continuous row of gemstones around the outer edge.
description_view_1: A side profile view highlighting the thickness of the band and the raised, embedded gemstones along the circumference.
description_view_2: A bottom-up view mirroring the top, again showing the circular form and gemstone arrangement.
description_view_3: A side profile view similar to view 1, emphasizing the band’s thickness and the alignment of the gemstones.
